fixtures.description: Synthetic unencrypted iPhone Finder/iTunes backup root for M1 open/detection flows and M2 ingest fixtures.
provenance: Generated from static synthetic device, message, contact, and file metadata in ios-mini-backup.mjs plus deterministic sqlite-wasm database builders in generate-fixtures.mjs.
Contains no real personal data and no copied backup content.
Manifest.db is a real SQLite database with Files rows for sms.db, sms.db-wal, AddressBook.sqlitedb, AddressBook.sqlitedb-wal, AddressBookImages.sqlitedb, and one MediaDomain attachment path.

sms.db, AddressBook.sqlitedb, and AddressBookImages.sqlitedb are real SQLite databases containing synthetic M2 ingest data, including typedstream message text, WAL-only rows, a tapback reaction row, attachment metadata, contact handles, a prefixed thumbnail blob for image magic sniffing, and a malformed avatar blob for warning coverage.

fixtures.description: Synthetic encrypted iPhone Finder/iTunes backup root for M5 password, ingest, browse, and attachment-decryption flows.
provenance: Generated entirely from the same static synthetic messages, contacts, SQLite databases, WAL sidecars, avatar blobs, and PNG attachment as ios-mini-backup; contains no real personal data and no copied backup content.

Manifest.plist carries a deterministic BackupKeyBag with two passcode-wrapped class records plus a class-4 ManifestKey. The fixed synthetic password and independent PBKDF2/AES-KW vectors are exported by ios-mini-backup.mjs.

Default CI uses the real two-stage KDF structure and a realistic 10,000-round SHA-1 stage, while reducing the expensive SHA-256 stage to 100,000 rounds. A separate exported 10,000,000-round vector can run on demand with GOLEMINE_RUN_SLOW_KDF=1.

Manifest.db and every source database, WAL sidecar, contact-image database, and attachment are independently AES-256-CBC encrypted with a zero IV and PKCS#7 padding. MBFile.Size remains authoritative, including for block-aligned plaintext that receives a full 16-byte padding block.

Each encrypted Files.file value is an NSKeyedArchiver-shaped MBFile: $top.root is a UID into $objects, and EncryptionKey is a UID to a NSMutableData object carrying NS.data. The 44-byte value is a little-endian class number followed by a 40-byte RFC 3394 AES-KW key. The generator unwraps, decrypts, validates padding, and byte-compares every payload; focused parser and ingest tests validate the archived metadata indirection.

fixtures.description: Synthetic unencrypted fuzz fixture proving malformed optional Messages records are skipped and reported without aborting ingest.
provenance: Generated entirely from static synthetic data and deterministic sqlite-wasm builders; contains no real personal data or copied backup content.

The valid mini-backup corpus is extended with a truncated attributedBody payload, an attachment missing from Manifest.db, a reaction targeting a missing message, and the existing corrupt contact-avatar blob.
The required Manifest.db and sms.db structures remain readable so production ingest reaches normalization, preserves valid rows, and returns explicit warning records for malformed optional content.
